raw_response:

However, another aspect worth noting could be if there were any signs suggesting volume overload rather than just pressure overload, which would further strengthen the case towards left atrial enlargement seen through modified P waves but remains less evident compared to direct indicators such as those observed now favoring option C over others provided.
